title: invAIriant Evidence Bundle
description: The deterministic fact bundle produced by `invairiant collect` and handed to the /invairiant skill as input. Everything here is a candidate pointer gathered mechanically — NOT a finding. The skill applies lenses; only verified, evidence-bound claims become findings. The CLI never judges.

resolved_scope.description: The bounded audit scope collect resolved to — the boundary made explicit and auditable. Every downstream field (tree, language stats, signals, generated mass) is computed over this file set only. `bounded: false` occurs solely for the opt-in `repo` scope; every other kind fails closed rather than silently widening.

target.description: The pin: the range, commit sha, module path, ADR/proposal path, or PR number (null for the working tree).

sample_files.description: A capped preview of the in-scope files (not necessarily the full set).

has_diff.description: True for change scopes (working/range/commit/pr); false for snapshot scopes (module/adr/rp/repo).

base.description: PR scope only: the resolved base ref (e.g. origin/main) the PR diffs against.

head.description: PR scope only: the PR head (branch name or short sha).

resolver.description: PR scope only: how the PR was pinned — gh CLI, or the git pull/<n>/head ref.

head_checked_out.description: PR scope only: whether the PR head equals the working-tree HEAD. When false, content-level grep signals are sparse (read from the working tree) though the diff/file set/mass stay correct from git.

docs.description: Scope-supplied documents joined to the canonical set (e.g. the ADR text for an adr scope).
